name: BEMmon

signature_move.name: Messer Claw
signature_move.description: Pierces the enemy with its sharp claws.

description: An artificial Digimon that was created experimentally by someone. Programmed only with the command codes for "eating and getting stronger", once it defeats an enemy, it uses its " Fusionize " to turn them into its flesh and blood. Its Special Move is piercing the enemy with its sharp claws ( Messer Claw ).
